## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Test

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's TypeScript strict mode — no `any`
- [ ] I have added tests for new/changed behaviour
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes with no warnings (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript type-check passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, JSDoc)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
